case_title: KEN BING QUAN LIANG et al VS. BORIS ZUTNER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,697.53 FILED BY LIANG, KEN BING QUAN LIANG, HELEN YAN QIN FENG AS TO DEFENDANT ZUTNER, BORIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUL-02-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZUTNER, BORIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. HENRY KWAN SWORN AND ACTS AS CANTONESE INTERPRTER ON PLAINTIFFS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, KEN BING QUAN LIANG, HELEN YAN QIN FENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUTNER, BORIS $2,697.53 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,782.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZUTNER, BORIS
